message:
feat(supervision): add container/k8s supervision detection (6l1.3)

Implements ContainerSupervisionAnalyzer for detecting processes running
inside Docker, containerd, Podman, LXC, or Kubernetes containers. This
enables pt to recognize container-managed processes and recommend
appropriate container-level actions instead of direct signals.

Key features:
- Detects container runtime from cgroup paths
- Extracts container ID and K8s metadata (pod name, namespace, QoS class)
- Safe defaults: destructive actions (stop, delete) disabled by default
- Generates actionable recommendations (docker inspect, kubectl describe)
- 8 unit tests including no-mock tests with real processes

Safety: Container = supervisor, so containerized processes are marked
as supervised to prevent accidental killing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
